title: Garmin: Consumer Electronics Success Story
text: Garmin has successfully developed a range of products, with a focus on premium products and diversification, resulting in healthy revenue growth and strong competitive positioning. The company has opportunities in the growing demand for smartwatches and subscription-based services as well as international market expansion, particularly in Asia. Garmin's impressive margins and FCF conversion will support continued distributions to shareholders.

title: Garmin announces its title sponsorship of the world-renowned freediving event: Vertical Blue 2023 By Garmin
text: Introducing the Vertical Blue 2023 by Garmin: A Celebration of the Depths OLATHE, Kan. , June 27, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Garmin (NYSE: GRMN) today announces its inaugural title sponsorship of the Vertical Blue freediving competition.

title: Garmin unveils the GMR xHD3 series open-array radars
text: New xHD3 radars are Garmin's first magnetron models to offer scan averaging, along with enhanced target-size processing and improved true echo trails OLATHE, Kan. , June 27, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Garmin (NYSE: GRMN), the world's most innovative and recognized marine electronics manufacturer, today announced the GMR™ xHD3 series open-array radars  that combine high-definition imaging with the latest platform technology to deliver new levels of confidence, clarity and performance to cruisers and anglers alike.

title: 3 Stocks Ready to Bounce Back
text: Chewy announced accelerating growth trends last quarter. Garmin has a deep product portfolio.

title: 5 Top Tech Stocks To Buy With Massive Growth Potential
text: During the initial phase of the pandemic, tech stocks with massive growth potential took center stage. These companies, offering innovative solutions to the world's rapidly evolving problems, reaped the rewards from investors seeking the next big thing.

title: 2 Dividend-Paying Tech Stocks to Buy Right Now
text: Microsoft is a cash-rich business. Garmin is prepping for an eventual growth rebound.

title: Global call for entries announced for 2023 Garmin Health Awards
text: Third annual awards program recognizes the world's most innovative solutions that successfully integrate Garmin wearable technology into health and wellness programs OLATHE, Kan. , June 13, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Garmin (NYSE: GRMN) today announced a global call for entries for its 2023 Garmin Health Awards, celebrating the world's most innovative solutions that successfully leverage the power of Garmin wearable technology into health or wellness programs.

title: 4 Factor Dividend Growth Portfolio - Passively Outpacing The Market
text: The 4-factor dividend growth portfolio is a strategy that leverages the stock selection process of Schwab U.S. Dividend Equity ETF™, with a few minor twists. The portfolio gained 1.84% in May, outperforming the S&P 500 by 1.40%. Year-to-date the portfolio is up 6.66% and trailing the S&P 500 by 2.99%. Since inception, the portfolio is generating alpha over the S&P 500.

title: Garmin shareholders approve quarterly dividend through March 2024
text: Company announces record date and payment date for June 2023 dividend installment SCHAFFHAUSEN, Switzerland , June 9, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- At Garmin Ltd.'s annual shareholders' meeting held today, approval was received from the shareholders in accordance with Swiss corporate law for a cash dividend in the amount of $2.92 per share, payable in four equal installments.

title: 3 Electronics Stocks to Watch From a Prospering Industry
text: Electronics stocks Carrier Global (CARR), Garmin (GRMN) and Kopin (KOPN) are likely to benefit from investments in infrastructure and expanded capacity despite macroeconomic headwinds.

title: Garmin (GRMN) Expands Smartwatch Offerings With fenix 7 Pro
text: Garmin (GRMN) unveils a series of premium multisport GPS smartwatches, namely the fenix 7 Pro, to boost its smartwatch offerings.

title: Why Is Garmin (GRMN) Up 2.3% Since Last Earnings Report?
text: Garmin (GRMN) reported earnings 30 days ago. What's next for the stock?
